goal: Fix prod console: socket to Render, attendance 401, sync token, landing path

slices.goal: Socket direct to Render via VITE_API_URL; remove Nest attendance strangler from prod vercel.json
verifyCommands: npm run test --prefix client -- apiBase realtime
slices.evidence: Removed Nest /api/attendance strangler from vercel.json; generateVercelConfig writes VITE_API_URL + preview-only Nest strangler; tests 7/7 pass

slices.goal: Path-based /landing on app host; siteUrls default to APP_ORIGIN/landing
slices.evidence: App.jsx /landing route + Navigate; siteUrls LANDING_ORIGIN defaults to APP_ORIGIN/landing; client build exit 0

slices.goal: Sync token fetch uses same api base as axios on desktop production (Render + credentials)
slices.evidence: connectSyncEngine uses getSyncApiBase() — Render direct on desktop prod, same-origin on mobile/PWA

commandsRun: npm run test --prefix client -- apiBase realtime (7/7)
local dist embeds VITE_API_URL from RENDER_API_PROXY_URL
